recommendations.title: I Can Quit Whenever I Want 2: Masterclass
recommendations.overview: Pietro Zinni is asked by the police to revive the old gang to create a task force that will stop the spread of smart drugs.

recommendations.title: I Can Quit Whenever I Want
recommendations.overview: A university researcher is fired because of the cuts to university. To earn a living he decides to produce drugs recruiting his former colleagues, who despite their skills are living at the margins of society.

recommendations.title: Rose Island
recommendations.overview: In 1968, engineer Giorgio Rosa established the independent state called "The Isle of Roses" off the coast of Rimini, built on a platform outside the territorial waters, with Esperanto as the official language. The Italian authorities did not take it

recommendations.title: The Rutles: All You Need Is Cash
recommendations.overview: The story of the rise and fall of the Pre-Fab Four.

recommendations.title: El Cantante
recommendations.overview: The rise and fall of salsa singer, Héctor Lavoe (1946-1993), as told from the perspective of his wife Puchi, who looks back from 2002.

recommendations.title: Respect
recommendations.overview: The rise of Aretha Franklin’s career from a child singing in her father’s church’s choir to her international superstardom.

recommendations.title: The Dirt
recommendations.overview: The story of Mötley Crüe and their rise from the Sunset Strip club scene of the early 1980s to superstardom.

recommendations.title: Miles Ahead
recommendations.overview: An exploration of the life and music of Miles Davis.

recommendations.title: Fabrizio De André: Principe libero
recommendations.overview: A biopic on the personal and artistic life of Italian songwriter Fabrizio De André.
